goal.value: 16 Beads für Credential-basierten Login-Flow (deviceId entfernt, deviceName, login_token mit type-Feld + Conditional Authenticators).

progress.value:
⏳ Beads noch nicht erstellt — unterbrochen durch Memory Pressure

## Finaler Flow (vollständig besprochen, bereit zur Implementierung)

### REGISTRIERUNG
- App → Auth Service: deviceId, userId, name, activationCode, publicKey (PEM)
- Auth Service: RegistrationCode validieren, Device speichern + publicKeyHash (SHA-256), RSA-2048 Keypair (encPrivKey, encPubKey) erzeugen, Keycloak Credential anlegen (credentialData: publicKey/publicKeyHash/deviceId/encPubKey; secretData: encPrivKey)
- Response unverändert

### LOGIN Schritt 1: startLogin
- App → publicKeyHash
- Auth Service: Device lookup via publicKeyHash, Credential lesen → encPubKey, payload={userId,nonce,exp} als JSON, Hybrid-Encrypt (AES-GCM + RSA-OAEP), nonce in Challenge-Tabelle
- Response: encryptedKey, encryptedData, iv, nonce (Korrelations-ID)

### LOGIN Schritt 2: verifyChallenge
- App → nonce, encryptedKey, encryptedData, iv, signature (SHA256withRSA über encryptedData)
- Auth Service: nonce lookup, used=false+exp prüfen, used=true, login_token = Base64-JSON {sub:userId, encryptedKey, encryptedData, iv, signature}, Auth Code Flow → Keycloak

### Keycloak LoginTokenAuthenticator
- login_token dekodieren, User via sub, Credential laden (encPrivKey+publicKey), Hybrid-Decrypt, payload parsen {userId,nonce,exp}, exp+userId+nonce(SingleUseObjectProvider)+signature prüfen, success()

## Was entfällt
- challengeValue (überall)
- JWKS-Endpoint für Login Flow + issueKeycloakAssertionToken()
- IDP device-login-idp + FederatedIdentity-Links
- CachedJWKSet, JWKS-Fetch, trusted-client-ids, findIdpByIssuer()

## Zu erstellende Beads
1. [keycloak-ext] DeviceCredentialModel + DeviceCredentialProvider + Factory
2. [keycloak-ext] LoginTokenAuthenticator umbauen (Credential-Lookup + Hybrid-Decrypt + Signatur)
3. [auth-service] Flyway V11: public_key_hash auf devices, challenge_value optional
4. [auth-service] Device Entity + DeviceRepository: publicKeyHash Feld + findByPublicKeyHash
5. [auth-service] DeviceService: publicKeyHa
